document.title: SPECIFICATION ITEM : DISC CERAMIC CAPACITOR (Class I, II : High Voltage)

sourceSummary.oneLine: SAMWHA Capacitor specification for high voltage disc ceramic capacitors, including ECN part numbers, ratings, tests, environmental substance restrictions, marking, dimensions, packing, and cautions.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier/manufacturer specification and approval documentation for component qualification and design-development records.
keyPoints: The item is a disc ceramic capacitor, Class I/II high voltage, supplied to 대안 일렉콤 by SAMWHA CAPACITOR Co., Ltd with PT. SAMCON as manufacturer.
The specification covers EC temperature compensating fixed ceramic capacitors, epoxy coated ceramic capacitor, Class I.
Rated voltage codes are 4A: 10 kV, 4B: 12 kV, 4C: 15 kV, and 4D: 20 kV.
Operating temperature range for Class I is -25℃ to +100℃.
Environmental pollution materials section states never to use Pb, Hg, Cr+6, PBB, PBDE, Cd, and phthalates based on International RoHS Standard.

evidence.claim: The document is a specification for a disc ceramic capacitor, Class I/II high voltage.
evidence.evidenceText: SPECIFICATION ITEM : DISC CERAMIC CAPACITOR (Class I, II : High Voltage)

evidence.claim: The specification number or revision identifier shown in the document is SW-D02-01B.
The specification relates to temperature compensating, high dielectric constant disc type fixed ceramic capacitors intended for telecommunication equipment and electronic devices.
evidence.evidenceText: This specification relates temperature compensating, high dielectric constant disc type fixed ceramic capacitor, intended for use in equipment for telecommunication and in electronic devices.

evidence.claim: EC style means temperature compensating fixed ceramic capacitor, Class I, epoxy coated ceramic capacitor.
evidence.evidenceText: EC : Temperature compensating fixed ceramic capacitor (class Ⅰ) - Epoxy coated ceramic capacitor

evidence.claim: Rated voltage codes are 4A: 10 kV, 4B: 12 kV, 4C: 15 kV, and 4D: 20 kV.
Class I operating temperature range is -25℃ to +100℃.
Insulation resistance between terminals must be more than 10000 MΩ under the specified 500 VDC charge condition.
evidence.evidenceText: Insulation resistance Between terminals More than 10000㏁ - Applied Voltage : Charge at 500 VDC - Charge Time : 60 ± 5 sec

evidence.claim: For withstand voltage, 4A, 4B, and 4C are tested at 150% of rating voltage, while 4D is tested at 130% of rating voltage.
evidence.evidenceText: 4A, 4B, 4C : Applied voltage 150% of rating voltage... 4D : Applied voltage 130% of rating voltage

evidence.claim: High temperature load testing is performed at 85 ± 2℃ for 1000 +48,-0 hours.
evidence.evidenceText: High Temperature Load... Temperature : 85 ± 2℃ - Testing Time : 1000 +48,-0 hours
evidence.pageTarget: Ceramic Capacitor High Temperature Load Test

evidence.claim: The environmental pollution materials regulation prohibits Pb, Hg, Cr+6, PBB, PBDE, Cd, and phthalates based on International RoHS Standard.
evidence.evidenceText: The Regulation of Environmental Pollution Materials *Never use materials mentioned below based on International RoHS Standard. *Pb, Hg, Cr+6, PBB, PBDE, Cd, Phthalate (DEHP, DBP, BBP & DIBP).

evidence.claim: The document references EIA-STD, RS-198-C for rated value testing method/application.
evidence.evidenceText: Rated Value Testing method/application (EIA-STD, RS-198-C) Class I

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text contains no FDA authority, FDA clearance, FDA approval, or FDA jurisdiction statement.
No explicit regulatory approval status is present; the source is primarily a supplier/manufacturer component specification.
Revision history table appears mostly blank; SW-D02-01B is present as specification/revision identifier, but no revision approval entry is populated.
Preprocessed text contains OCR artifacts and encoding issues such as repeated page headers and garbled symbols, though key technical facts remain readable.
